mapper.select: SELECT AVG(score) FROM xm_answer_report WHERE course_id = #{courseId}

SELECT score, answer_time, IF (b.score >= (SELECT pass_score FROM xm_project WHERE id = #{projectId}), 1, 0) AS qualified FROM xm_answer_report b WHERE b.person_id = #{personId} AND b.project_id = #{projectId} AND b.type = 2 AND b.course_id IS NULL ORDER BY b.create_time DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM xm_course_question WHERE is_delete = 0 AND course_id IN ( SELECT relate_ids FROM xm_project_relate WHERE project_id = #{projectId} AND type = 2 AND is_delete = 0 )
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM xm_course_question WHERE is_delete = 0 AND course_id = #{courseId}
SELECT * FROM xm_answer_report WHERE is_delete = 0 AND type = 2 AND project_id = #{projectId} AND person_id = #{personId} ORDER BY create_time DESC LIMIT 1
